---
title: "Management-procedure components"
---

{{< include ../_includes/sprfmo-banner.qmd >}}

<div class="paper-title">Management-Procedure Components</div>

This page reorganizes the architecture and inventory in SCW17/Paper-03. In
`jmMSE`, a management procedure normally combines three controlled modules:

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  D["Observed annual data"] --> E["Estimator: est"]
  E --> S["Status or index metric"]
  S --> H["Harvest control rule: hcr"]
  H --> R["Catch recommendation"]
  R --> I["Implementation system: isys"]
  I --> A["Implemented catch by fishery or stock"]
```

| Component | Role | Examples inventoried at SCW17 |
|---|---|---|
| `est` | Converts observations or assessment output into the metric used by the rule. | `perfect.sa`, `shortcut.sa`, `cpue.ind`, `cpuescore.ind`, `meta.est`, `spict.sa` |
| `hcr` | Converts that metric into a catch or effort recommendation. | `fixedC.hcr`, `hockeystick.hcr`, `buffer.hcr`, `bufferdelta.hcr`, `meta.hcr` |
| `isys` | Allocates or modifies the recommendation for implementation. | `split.is`, `bank_borrow.is` |

## Families represented in the SCW17 inventory

| Family | Typical estimator | Typical HCR | Role at SCW17 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Fixed catch reference | Perfect information | Fixed catch | Diagnostic baseline |
| Shortcut assessment | Depletion estimate | Hockeystick or buffer | Assessment-based comparison |
| Empirical index | CPUE/index aggregate | Buffer or hockeystick | Main CMP development family |
| SPiCT assessment | SPiCT biomass/status | Buffer | Model-based candidate |
| Multi-index/meta | Multiple index scores | Meta-HCR | Exploratory candidate |
| Banking/borrowing | Existing estimator/HCR | Existing HCR plus modified `isys` | Implementation sensitivity |

These families are an inventory, not a decision about which procedure should be
selected. Exact CMP identity requires the module versions, full argument set,
input definitions, and implementation rules recorded together.
